changelog: Fixed: `gitmap/cmd/updateprobe_test.go` — `TestParseCurrentRepoSlug` had been self-rewritten to use `gitmap-v27` while still expecting stale parsed versions (`23` and `1`). The test now derives the current-slug case from one `currentSlugVersion` constant and uses a synthetic `tool-v1` case for the v1 parser branch, preventing future repo bumps from rewriting only half of the assertion.

Hardened: `fixrepo_rewrite_preview_test.go` and `fixrepo_rewrite_barebase_test.go` now use synthetic `acme-vN` tokens instead of this repo's own `gitmap-v27` literals, so future `fix-repo` bumps cannot silently rot the rewrite/preview regression tests.
